azerbaijan.title: Arrival in Baku
activities: Arrive in Baku, the capital city of Azerbaijan.
Check-in at your hotel and rest after your journey.
Explore the local area and try some traditional Azerbaijani cuisine.

azerbaijan.title: Baku City Tour
activities: Visit the UNESCO-listed Old City (Icherisheher) with its historic buildings and narrow streets.
Explore the Palace of the Shirvanshahs, Maiden Tower, and Juma Mosque.
Visit the modern Flame Towers and Highland Park for panoramic views of the city.

azerbaijan.title: Excursion to Gobustan & Mud Volcanoes
activities: Take a day trip to Gobustan National Park, known for its ancient rock carvings and mud volcanoes.
Learn about Azerbaijan's prehistoric history and see unique geological features.

azerbaijan.title: Day Trip to Gabala
activities: Travel to Gabala, a beautiful region known for its lush landscapes and outdoor activities.
Visit Nohur Lake, Tufandag Mountain Resort, and the Gabala Shooting Club.

azerbaijan.title: Sheki Exploration
activities: Drive to Sheki and visit the Sheki Khan's Palace, known for its stunning stained glass windows.
Explore the charming Sheki Bazaar and the local craftsmanship.

azerbaijan.title: Back to Baku and Free Time
activities: Return to Baku from Sheki.
Enjoy some leisure time to explore more of Baku or go souvenir shopping.

azerbaijan.title: Departure
activities: Check out from your hotel.
Depending on your flight time, you may have some free time before departing from Baku.

egypt.title: Arrival in Cairo
activities: Arrive at Cairo International Airport.
Meet and greet by the tour representative.
Transfer to the hotel for check-in and rest.
Optional evening: Nile River Dinner Cruise.

egypt.title: Cairo - Giza Pyramids and Sphinx
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Visit the Giza Plateau to see the Pyramids of Giza (Great Pyramid of Khufu, Pyramid of Khafre, Pyramid of Menkaure) and the iconic Sphinx.
Explore the Solar Boat Museum (optional).
Visit the Egyptian Museum to see ancient artifacts, including the treasures of Tutankhamun.
Overnight in Cairo.

egypt.title: Cairo - Saqqara and Memphis
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Visit the Saqqara necropolis to see the Step Pyramid of Djoser and other ancient tombs and structures.
Explore the ancient city of Memphis, the former capital of Egypt.
Return to Cairo.
Optional: Sound and Light Show at the Pyramids.

egypt.title: Cairo - Luxor
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out from the hotel and transfer to Cairo Airport.
Fly to Luxor.
Visit the Karnak Temple Complex, one of the most significant religious centers of ancient Egypt.
Check-in at the Luxor hotel and overnight stay.

egypt.title: Luxor - West Bank
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Cross the Nile to the West Bank.
Visit the Valley of the Kings, where many pharaohs were buried, including Tutankhamun's tomb (additional ticket required).
Explore the Temple of Queen Hatshepsut at Deir el-Bahri and the Colossi of Memnon.
Return to Luxor and optional evening: Hot Air Balloon Ride over Luxor.

egypt.title: Luxor - Edfu - Kom Ombo - Aswan
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out from the Luxor hotel.
Visit the Temple of Horus in Edfu (by horse carriage or caleche).
Continue to Kom Ombo to see the unique double temple dedicated to Sobek and Horus.
Arrive in Aswan, check-in at the hotel, and overnight stay.

egypt.title: Aswan - High Dam and Philae Temple
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Visit the Aswan High Dam, a modern engineering marvel.
Explore the beautiful Philae Temple, dedicated to the goddess Isis, located on an island in the Nile.
Optional: Nubian Village tour and Felucca (traditional sailboat) ride on the Nile.
Overnight in Aswan.

egypt.title: Aswan - Cairo - Departure
activities: Breakfast at the hotel.
Check out from the Aswan hotel.
Optional: Abu Simbel Temple tour (requires an early start).
Transfer to Aswan Airport and fly back to Cairo.
Connect with your international departure flight or extend your stay in Egypt.

fiji.title: Arrival in Nadi
activities: Arrive at Nadi International Airport.
Transfer to your hotel or resort in Nadi.
Relax and unwind after your journey, enjoy the resort amenities, and take in the beautiful surroundings.

fiji.title: Nadi - Island Tour
activities: After breakfast, embark on a full-day island tour to explore the highlights of Nadi.
Visit the Garden of the Sleeping Giant, known for its stunning orchids and lush tropical gardens.
Stop at the Sabeto Hot Springs and Mud Pool for a rejuvenating mud bath.
Discover the vibrant local markets and shops to buy souvenirs.
Return to your hotel for an evening at leisure.

fiji.title: Nadi - Denarau Island
activities: Check out of your Nadi accommodation and transfer to Denarau Island.
Check-in at your chosen resort and spend the day enjoying the facilities.
Take a dip in the pool or head to the beach for some relaxation.

fiji.title: Denarau Island - Coral Coast
activities: After breakfast, depart for the Coral Coast, a beautiful stretch of coastline known for its stunning beaches and resorts.
Check-in at your Coral Coast resort and spend the day exploring the area.
Optional activities include snorkeling, kayaking, or simply relaxing by the beach.

fiji.title: Coral Coast - Sigatoka River Safari
activities: Join an exciting Sigatoka River Safari tour, which offers a unique adventure through Fijian villages and lush landscapes.
Experience a traditional kava ceremony and interact with the friendly locals.
Learn about Fijian culture and customs during the tour.
Return to the resort for an evening at leisure.

fiji.title: Coral Coast - Beqa Island Day Trip
activities: Embark on a day trip to Beqa Island, known for its crystal-clear waters and vibrant marine life.
Enjoy snorkeling or diving in the Beqa Lagoon, home to diverse coral reefs and colorful fish.
Indulge in a beachside picnic lunch and relax on the pristine shores.
Return to the Coral Coast in the evening.

fiji.title: Departure from Fiji
activities: Enjoy your last morning in Fiji, taking in the beautiful surroundings one last time.
Check out of the resort and transfer to Nadi International Airport for your departure flight.

greece.title: Arrival in Athens
activities: Arrive in Athens, the capital city of Greece.
Check into your hotel and take some rest after your journey.
In the evening, explore the vibrant Plaka neighborhood, known for its charming streets, traditional Greek taverns, and souvenir shops.
Overnight in Athens.

greece.title: Athens Sightseeing
activities: Visit the iconic Acropolis and its ancient monuments, including the Parthenon, Erechtheion, and the Temple of Athena Nike.
Explore the Acropolis Museum, which houses a vast collection of artifacts from the Acropolis site.
Discover the ancient Agora of Athens, the heart of the city's public life in classical times.
Overnight in Athens.

greece.title: Day Trip to Delphi
activities: Take a day trip to Delphi, a UNESCO World Heritage site and once considered the center of the world in ancient Greek mythology.
Visit the Temple of Apollo, the Delphi Archaeological Museum, and enjoy breathtaking views of the surrounding landscape.
Return to Athens in the evening.
Overnight in Athens.

greece.title: Athens to Santorini
activities: Take a ferry or a short flight to Santorini, one of the most famous and picturesque Greek islands.
Upon arrival, check into your hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at your leisure.
Experience a stunning sunset in Oia, known for its iconic white-washed buildings and blue-domed churches.
Overnight in Santorini.

greece.title: Explore Santorini
activities: Explore the volcanic island of Santorini, visit the black sand beaches, and swim in the Aegean Sea.
Visit the ancient site of Akrotiri, a Minoan Bronze Age settlement buried under volcanic ash.
Enjoy a wine tasting at one of the local vineyards, known for producing excellent wine.
Overnight in Santorini.

greece.title: Santorini to Mykonos
activities: Take a ferry or flight to Mykonos, another popular Greek island known for its vibrant nightlife and beautiful beaches.
Check into your hotel and spend the rest of the day at leisure, exploring the charming town and its narrow streets.
Overnight in Mykonos.

greece.title: Explore Mykonos
activities: Explore the famous beaches of Mykonos, such as Paradise Beach, Super Paradise Beach, and Psarou Beach.
Visit the iconic windmills and Little Venice, two of the most photographed spots on the island.
Experience the vibrant nightlife of Mykonos at the various bars and clubs.
Overnight in Mykonos.

greece.title: Mykonos to Crete
activities: Take a ferry or flight to Crete, the largest and most diverse of the Greek islands.
Check into your hotel and relax after your journey.
Spend the evening exploring the charming old town of Chania with its Venetian harbor and narrow streets.
Overnight in Crete.

greece.title: Explore Crete
activities: Visit the ancient archaeological site of Knossos, the legendary home of King Minos and the Minotaur.
Explore the Palace of Phaistos and the archaeological museum in Heraklion.
Enjoy some leisure time at one of Crete's beautiful beaches.
Overnight in Crete.

greece.title: Departure
activities: Depart from Crete to Athens for your return journey home or your next destination.

japan.title: Arrival in Tokyo
activities: Arrive in Tokyo, Japan's bustling capital city.
Check into your accommodation and rest after your journey.
Explore the local neighborhood, try some Japanese street food, and get acclimated to the city.

japan.title: Tokyo Sightseeing
activities: Visit the historic Asakusa district, including the iconic Senso-ji Temple.
Head to the trendy Shibuya Crossing and Harajuku area for shopping and people-watching.
In the evening, enjoy the vibrant nightlife of Shinjuku.

japan.title: Tokyo Sightseeing
activities: Spend the morning at the Tokyo Imperial Palace and its beautiful gardens.
Visit the Meiji Shrine for a serene experience amidst nature.
Explore the high-tech Akihabara district, known for its electronics and anime culture.

japan.title: Day Trip to Nikko
activities: Take a day trip to Nikko, a UNESCO World Heritage site known for its stunning temples and natural beauty.
Visit Toshogu Shrine and take a walk through the picturesque Nikko National Park.

japan.title: Travel to Kyoto
activities: Travel to Kyoto, the cultural heart of Japan, via bullet train (Shinkansen).
Check into your accommodation and explore the nearby Gion district, known for its traditional atmosphere and geisha sightings.

japan.title: Kyoto Sightseeing
activities: Visit Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion) and Ryoan-ji Temple.
Explore the beautiful Arashiyama Bamboo Grove and the Tenryu-ji Temple.
In the evening, visit Fushimi Inari Taisha, famous for its thousands of red torii gates.

japan.title: Day Trip to Nara
activities: Take a day trip to Nara, the ancient capital of Japan.
Visit Todai-ji Temple, which houses the impressive Great Buddha (Daibutsu).
Enjoy the friendly deer in Nara Park.

japan.title: Travel to Hiroshima
activities: Travel to Hiroshima by Shinkansen.
Visit the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park and Museum to learn about the city's history and resilience.

japan.title: Miyajima Island
activities: Take a day trip to Miyajima Island, known for its iconic floating Itsukushima Shrine.
Enjoy the scenic beauty and hike up Mount Misen for panoramic views.

japan.title: Back to Tokyo and Departure
activities: Travel back to Tokyo and spend your last day shopping or exploring any missed spots.
Depart from Tokyo's airport for your onward journey.

norway.title: Arrival in Oslo
activities: Arrive in Oslo, the capital of Norway.
Transfer to your hotel and rest after your journey.
Explore the city on your own or take a leisurely walk around the harbor.

norway.title: Oslo Sightseeing
activities: Take a guided city tour of Oslo.
Visit popular attractions like the Viking Ship Museum, the Fram Museum, and the Vigeland Sculpture Park.
Enjoy an evening in the city center, exploring shops and restaurants.

norway.title: Oslo to Bergen
activities: Take a scenic train ride from Oslo to Bergen (Flåm Railway or Norway in a Nutshell route).
Arrive in Bergen, a charming coastal city.
Check-in at your hotel and enjoy a free evening to explore Bryggen, a UNESCO-listed historic area.

norway.title: Bergen Sightseeing
activities: Embark on a guided city tour of Bergen.
Visit the famous Fish Market, Bryggen Hanseatic Wharf, and the Troldhaugen Museum (former home of composer Edvard Grieg).
Take the Fløibanen funicular to Mount Fløyen for panoramic views of the city.

norway.title: Fjord Cruise
activities: Enjoy a full-day fjord cruise, such as the Norway in a Nutshell tour or a specific fjord like Nærøyfjord or Sognefjord.
Experience the stunning natural beauty of Norway's fjords, mountains, and waterfalls.

norway.title: Bergen to Tromsø
activities: Fly from Bergen to Tromsø, located in northern Norway.
Upon arrival, check-in at your hotel and have the rest of the day at leisure.
Consider exploring the Arctic Cathedral and taking a cable car ride for fantastic views.

norway.title: Tromsø Arctic Experience
activities: Take part in a thrilling Arctic adventure, like a dog sledding tour or a reindeer sleigh ride.
Explore the city and its museums, such as the Polar Museum and the Tromsø Museum.

norway.title: Tromsø to Trondheim
activities: Fly from Tromsø to Trondheim, a historic city in central Norway.
Upon arrival, check-in at your hotel and relax or explore the city's landmarks.

norway.title: Trondheim Sightseeing
activities: Join a guided tour of Trondheim.
Visit Nidaros Cathedral, the Archbishop's Palace, and the Old Town Bridge (Gamle Bybro).
Explore the vibrant cultural scene and waterfront area.

norway.title: Departure
activities: Transfer to Trondheim Airport for your departure.

peru.title: Arrival in Lima
activities: Arrive in Lima, the capital of Peru.
Transfer to your hotel and check-in.
Rest and recover from your journey.

peru.title: Lima City Tour
activities: Explore Lima on a city tour.
Visit the historic center, including Plaza de Armas, the Government Palace, and the Cathedral.
Discover the Larco Museum, showcasing pre-Columbian art and artifacts.
Enjoy Peruvian cuisine at a local restaurant.

peru.title: Fly to Cusco and Explore
activities: Take a domestic flight to Cusco, the ancient Incan capital.
Acclimate to the altitude and spend the day exploring the city.
Visit the Plaza de Armas, the Incan Temple of the Sun (Qorikancha), and the San Pedro Market.

peru.title: Sacred Valley Tour
activities: Embark on a full-day tour of the Sacred Valley.
Visit the Pisac Market and the Inca ruins at Pisac.
Stop for lunch at a traditional Andean restaurant.
Explore the Ollantaytambo fortress and town.

peru.title: Machu Picchu
activities: Take an early morning train to Aguas Calientes.
Explore the ancient Incan citadel of Machu Picchu with a guided tour.
Spend the day marveling at the impressive architecture and breathtaking views.
Return to Cusco in the evening.

peru.title: Free Day in Cusco
activities: Enjoy a free day to relax or explore more of Cusco at your leisure.
Consider visiting the Sacsayhuaman ruins or the San Blas neighborhood known for its artisan shops.

peru.title: Journey to Puno
activities: Take a scenic bus ride or a comfortable train journey to Puno, located on the shores of Lake Titicaca.
Enjoy the views of the Andean landscape along the way.

peru.title: Lake Titicaca Tour
activities: Explore Lake Titicaca, the highest navigable lake in the world.
Take a boat tour to the Uros Floating Islands, constructed from reeds by the Uros people.
Visit Taquile Island to experience the local culture and traditional textiles.

peru.title: Return to Lima
activities: Fly back to Lima from Puno.
Use the afternoon for last-minute shopping or optional activities.

peru.title: Departure
activities: Check out from your hotel and transfer to the airport for your departure.

phuket.title: Arrival in Phuket
activities: Arrive at Phuket International Airport
Transfer to your hotel and check-in
Rest and relax after your journey
Explore the local area and enjoy a delicious Thai dinner

phuket.title: Phang Nga Bay Tour
activities: Early breakfast at the hotel
Full-day tour to Phang Nga Bay, famous for its stunning limestone cliffs and emerald waters
Visit James Bond Island, where 'The Man with the Golden Gun' was filmed
Explore sea caves and canoe through the mangroves
Enjoy a fresh seafood lunch on a floating Muslim village
Return to the hotel in the late afternoon

phuket.title: Phi Phi Islands Tour
activities: Breakfast at the hotel
Full-day tour to Phi Phi Islands, one of Thailand's most famous island groups
Snorkel in the crystal-clear waters, swim, and relax on the beautiful beaches
Visit Maya Bay, known for its appearance in the movie 'The Beach'
Enjoy a delicious beachside lunch
Return to the hotel in the evening

phuket.title: Phuket City Tour and Cultural Experience
activities: Breakfast at the hotel
Half-day city tour of Phuket
Visit the Big Buddha, an iconic landmark with panoramic views of the island
Explore Wat Chalong, one of the most significant Buddhist temples in Phuket
Stroll through Old Phuket Town, known for its Sino-Portuguese architecture and charming streets
Experience the local culture through traditional dance performances and Thai cuisine
Optional: Visit a night market for shopping and trying local street food

phuket.title: Relaxation and Departure
activities: Breakfast at the hotel
Spend the morning relaxing on the beach or enjoying the hotel facilities
Check-out from the hotel
Transfer to Phuket International Airport for your departure

turkey.title: Arrival in Istanbul
activities: Arrive in Istanbul, the vibrant city that straddles Europe and Asia.
Transfer to your hotel and rest after your journey.
In the evening, you can take a leisurely walk around the hotel area or visit a nearby local market.

turkey.title: Istanbul City Tour
activities: Explore the iconic Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and the Topkapi Palace.
Visit the Grand Bazaar for a taste of traditional Turkish shopping.
Take a relaxing Bosphorus cruise to enjoy the beautiful views of Istanbul's skyline.

turkey.title: Istanbul to Cappadocia
activities: Take a domestic flight to Cappadocia.
Upon arrival, check into your hotel and rest.
In the evening, you can opt for an optional Turkish folk dance and dinner show.

turkey.title: Cappadocia Hot Air Balloon Ride and Sightseeing
activities: Early morning hot air balloon ride over the unique landscapes of Cappadocia (optional but highly recommended).
Visit the Goreme Open-Air Museum, Pasabag Valley, and Uchisar Castle.
Explore the fascinating underground city of Kaymakli or Derinkuyu.

turkey.title: Cappadocia to Pamukkale
activities: Drive or take a domestic flight to Pamukkale.
Explore the stunning terraces of Pamukkale, known as the 'Cotton Castle.'
Relax in the thermal waters of Hierapolis Ancient City.

turkey.title: Pamukkale to Kusadasi
activities: Drive to Kusadasi, a coastal town near Ephesus.
En route, visit the ancient city of Aphrodisias, known for its well-preserved ruins.

turkey.title: Ephesus Ancient City Tour
activities: Explore the well-preserved ancient city of Ephesus, including the Library of Celsus, the Great Theatre, and the Temple of Artemis.
Visit the House of the Virgin Mary, a sacred pilgrimage site.

turkey.title: Kusadasi to Antalya
activities: Travel to Antalya, a beautiful coastal city on the Mediterranean.
En route, visit the ancient city of Perge and the Aspendos Theatre.

turkey.title: Antalya Sightseeing
activities: Explore Antalya's historic sites, such as Hadrian's Gate and the Old Town (Kaleici).
Relax on one of Antalya's stunning beaches or take a boat tour along the coast.

turkey.title: Departure from Antalya
activities: Depending on your flight schedule, you may have some free time for last-minute shopping or sightseeing.
Transfer to the airport for your departure.
